blocker: full 30-step group-8 run (2400 rollouts) exceeds ~15-min compute cap; trainable slug opensre-qwen3-8b 404s (needs `hud models fork`). Live --group 8 smoke still ran end-to-end (n=16=2x8, SMOKE OK), proving the config.
one_line: Built+validated a group-size-8 RFT config/launcher and a log-grounded variance analysis (within-group sigma~0.069 -> 4->8 cuts GRPO baseline-mean error 29.3% / variance 50% at 2x rollout cost); proved group=8 runs live via smoke; verdict: modest second-order win, not the flat-reward fix.
